title: Classifying finite groups G with three Aut(G)-orbits
summary: We give a complete and irredundant list of the finite groups $G$ for which Aut$(G)$, acting naturally on $G$, has precisely $3$ orbits. There are 7 infinite families: one abelian, one non-nilpotent, three families of non-abelian $2$-groups and two families of non-abelian $p$-groups with $p$ odd. The non-abelian $2$-group examples were first classified by Bors and Glasby in 2020 and non-abelian $p$-group examples with $p$ odd were classified independently by Li and Zhu, and by the author, in March 2024.
